hooks.command: if [[ "$TOOL_ARGS" == *"git commit"* ]]; then cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && echo 'Staged files:' && git diff --staged --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '' && echo 'Branch:' $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && echo ''; fi

cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_ARGS" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*' | cut -d'"' -f4) && if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then echo 'Type checking...' && pnpm -r typecheck 2>&1 | grep -E '(error TS|✓|error:)' | head -15 || echo 'TypeScript OK'; fi
which notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude Code needs your attention' || true
